title: Aurora Derm | Clear dermatology to start in Quito
description: Aurora Derm helps you start through WhatsApp, in-clinic dermatology, or teledermatology in Quito, with clear explanations and follow-up you can understand.

slides.title: We first understand your case, then define the right route.
slides.description: We listen first, examine skin, hair, and nails, then make clear whether comprehensive diagnosis, follow-up, or a narrower route fits best.
slides.alt: Clinical dermatology direction with a structured read

slides.title: We treat only what truly adds value to your skin.
slides.description: Laser, peels, and biostimulation are chosen by phototype, clinical objective, and the follow-up you can realistically sustain.

slides.title: If your case can move remotely first, we say it plainly.
slides.description: Teledermatology helps when clear photos and a useful history can move the case early and show when clinic in Quito becomes necessary.
slides.alt: Teledermatology intake with clinical context and imaging

slides.title: Follow-up keeps you from restarting from zero every time.
slides.description: Each review compares progression, adjusts recommendations, and keeps the next step visible instead of leaving loose ends.
slides.alt: Dermatology follow-up with comparative review and medical adjustments

slides.title: Aurora Derm works like a clinic, not a showroom.
slides.description: You receive a dermatology read, direct guidance, and a plan that stays understandable before we ask you to make a bigger decision.

newsStrip.label: How to start today
newsStrip.headline: Message us on WhatsApp and we will help you place whether today calls for clinic, treatment, or teledermatology.
newsStrip.detail: Online booking is still under maintenance, but you do not need to stay stuck. Through WhatsApp we review the reason for care, point you to the clearest route, and tell you when teledermatology helps and when clinic in Quito matters more.

editorial.title: Three clear ways to begin.
editorial.deck: An in-clinic consultation, a treatment decision, or remote guidance, depending on what you need today.

cards.title: Begin with a complete read
cards.copy: When symptoms overlap or everything just started, this visit sorts priority, risk, and the next step without making you guess.
cards.alt: Initial dermatology visit with a clear map of findings and priorities

cards.title: Indicated treatments, not impulse
cards.copy: Laser, peels, and biostimulation are chosen only when they add real clinical value and can be followed safely.
cards.alt: Dermatology laser platform with controlled settings

cards.title: Move today without guessing blind
cards.copy: Teledermatology helps you start early, organize images, and know when remote care is enough and when clinic matters.
cards.alt: Remote dermatology review with follow-up and adjustment

trustSignals.title: Before we ask you to book, we help you place the right next step.
trustSignals.deck: Aurora Derm works like a real dermatology clinic: clear contact, medical evaluation, and an in-clinic handoff when the case needs it.

cards.title: Start with a clear conversation
cards.copy: On WhatsApp you can tell us what is happening, and we help sort whether clinic, follow-up, or teledermatology makes the most sense.

cards.title: If direct examination matters, we say so early
cards.copy: If the case needs physical examination, dermatoscopy, or a procedure, we move you into clinic instead of sending you in circles.

cards.title: Each next step is explained
cards.copy: We do not push you into an appointment just to push one. We explain what should happen first, when follow-up makes sense, and when clinic is the right move.

corporateMatrix.title: Then narrow the route to what you need.
corporateMatrix.deck: These options refine the decision once you know you need inflammation care, lesion review, integrated follow-up, or a specific medical procedure.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Phase-based care to calm flares, ease sensitivity, and avoid unnecessary relapse.
cards.alt: Dermatology follow-up for inflammation and skin sensitivity

cards.title: Lesions worth reviewing
cards.copy: Review recent change, bleeding, or warning signs before more time passes.
cards.alt: Dermatoscopy and lesion review with warning criteria

cards.title: Pediatric dermatology
cards.copy: Clear guidance for home, school, and caregivers when a child's skin changes or relapses.
cards.alt: Pediatric dermatology consultation with family support

cards.title: Skin, hair and nails
cards.copy: One coordinated read for mixed symptoms that should not be split across disconnected visits.
cards.alt: Integrated skin, hair, and nails route with coordinated review

cards.title: Teledermatology and clinic handoff
cards.copy: Remote guidance helps decide when follow-up at a distance is enough and when it is worth seeing you soon in Quito.
cards.alt: Teledermatology with clear criteria for moving into clinic

cards.title: Collagen biostimulators
cards.copy: Medical protocols for texture and firmness with realistic timelines and steady follow-up.
cards.alt: Firmness and skin quality support with a medical approach

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: If you want to move today, message us on WhatsApp. From there we point you to clinic, teledermatology, or the service page that best matches your case.
